creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 240810
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

epson-inkjet-printer-escpr has been updated to 1.7.25

Supported new model.

New PPD files for the following models have been added.
EP-315 series
PX-S155 series
PX-S505 series
WF-2110 series
XP-65 series

No file changes for autoconf, so fixed to use 2.69.
pkg-descr was re-quoted from the description for other packages, not from the README.

The build has been successful in the following environments in poudriere.
12.4-STABLE 1204500 amd64
